# CLAUDE.md

## Overview

The `tests/fixtures/tables` directory documents the daily and monthly table scenarios used for renderer parity.

## Index

| File | Contents (WHAT) | Read When (WHEN) |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `CLAUDE.md` | Table-fixture directory index and task map | Finding table snapshot fixture guidance |
| `README.md` | Table fixture scenarios and sanitization notes | Updating daily or monthly rendering coverage |
